verses.text: Abstain from noxious herbs, which are not the husbandry of Jesus Christ, because they are not the planting of the Father.
Not that I have found division among you, but filtering.
For as many as are of God and of Jesus Christ, they are with the bishop;
And as many as shall repent and enter into the unity of the Church, these also shall be of God, that they may be living after Jesus Christ.
